flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 34% at Universidad Ana G. Mendez-Gurabo Campus vs the 2003–2007 baseline (7.7k vs 11.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Universidad Ana G. Mendez-Gurabo Campus rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.8k → $7.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Universidad Ana G. Mendez-Gurabo Campus rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.8k → $7.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Universidad Ana G. Mendez-Gurabo Campus rose 31% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.2k → $13.4k).
